advancements.elemental_wizards_rpg.equip: Obtain all Elemental Apprentice Armor Set Parts
advancements.elemental_wizards_rpg.spell: Use a spell from the Tome of Water
Use a spell from the Tome of Earth
Use a spell from the Tome of Wind
advancements.rpg_classes.air_rune.title: Path of Wind
effect.elemental_wizards_rpg.bubble_foam: On contact protecting the player and pushing targets away.
effect.elemental_wizards_rpg.cleansing_w: Holy water, extinguishing fire and regenerating health.
effect.elemental_wizards_rpg.impaled.des: The Target gets Impaled and trapped.
effect.elemental_wizards_rpg.stone_flesh: Gives the user armor and armor toughness, if you have all hearts, the next attack will get reduced by 50%.
effect.elemental_wizards_rpg.tornado.des: Makes the target more vulnerable to fire spell damage, sucks it in the nearest tornado and knocks the target up.
effect.elemental_wizards_rpg.updraft.des: Keeps the target in the air and makes the target more vulnerable to air spell damage, if its in the air.
item.elemental_wizards_rpg.spell_book\/a:
Spell Book of Water Wizards, using water magic to damage foes and protect allies.
- Strengths: Balanced healing and damage.
- Weaknesses: Low defense and mobility
- Equipment: Light Armor
item.elemental_wizards_rpg.spell_book\/t:
Spell Book of Earth Wizards, using earth magic to form dangerous and harming terrain.
- Strengths: Crowd Control and protection.
- Weaknesses: Limited mobility and range
- Equipment: Light Armor
item.elemental_wizards_rpg.spell_book\/w:
Spell Book of Wind Wizards, using wind magic to perform dangerous combos on enemies.
- Strengths: Strong CC and damage on single targets.
- Weaknesses: Low defense and no mobility
- Equipment: Light Armor
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.aqua_bubble_: Channel a cone of bubble {damage} damage to enemies and heal allies by {heal}..
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.aqua_explosi: Slow bouncy bubbles, dealing {damage} damage and healing allies for {heal} hearts in a area on impact.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.aqua_healing: Calls a healing rain cloud that deals {rain_damage} damage to targets and heals allies by {rain_heal} hearts.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.aqua_hydro_b: Channel a powerful beam of pressurized water that deals {damage} damage and soaks enemies in its path.
Release a splash of water that heals allies by {heal} and deals {damage} damage to targets.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.aqua_springw: Release a burst of cleansing water that heals allies by {heal} and damages targets by {damage} damage in an area around you.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.aqua_tidal_w: Tidal Wave that travels back and forth and deals {wave_damage} damage and knocks targets back.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.aqua_water_w: Lash out with a tendril of water that deals {damage} damage and soaks the target.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.aqua_waterba: Shoots multiple water balls that deal {damage} damage.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.avatar_passi: Wind: Deals {damage} damage around the caster and lets them levitate for {effect_duration} sec.
Earth: Summons falling stones from the sky that deal {damage} damage.
Water: Creates a Water zone, that deals {damage} damage and heals allies for {heal}.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.improved_aqu: Increases duration of Springwater Regeneration by {effect_duration_add} sec
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.improved_ter: Increases the duration of Terra Circle by {spawn_duration_add} sec.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.improved_win: Increases critical chance of Updraft by {critical_chance_bonus}
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.terra_drip_c: Creates a stone circle at the targets location that blocks it form passing through and deals {terra_circle_damage} damage.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.terra_earth_: Summons a Earth Golem, that smashes the ground and summons damaging spikes that deal {golem_spike_damage} damage and knock up on contact.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.terra_earthq: Creates a powerful Earthquake that deals {eq_damage} damage to all targets on the ground.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.terra_impale: Impales a target with a sharp stone, blocking its movement and dealing {damage} damage.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.terra_shatte: Launch a stone that shatters on impact, sending fragments in all directions that cause {damage} damage and bleeding wounds.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.terra_stone_: Encase yourself and nearby allies in protective stone armor, with full health the next incoming damage will be reduced by 50%%.  Also increases armor by {bonus} and armor toughness by {bonus2} per stack.
Launch a sharp stone spear that pierces enemies, causing {damage} damage and bleeding wounds.
Hurl a chunk of stone at an enemy, that deals {damage} damage in a small area on impact.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.wind_aerobla: Unleash a powerful blast of concentrated air that launches enemies skyward and deals {damage} damage.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.wind_aerobur: Pressure Burst, knocking targets in a circle back and dealing {damage} damage.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.wind_air_cut: Slash the air to create sharp wind blades that cut through enemies with considerable knockback and deal {damage} damage.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.wind_gust.de: Conjure a quick gust of wind that pushes enemies back with moderate force and deals {damage} damage.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.wind_stormdr: Channel bursts of high pressure air that deal {stormdraft_damage} damage and shortly stun enemies.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.wind_tornado: Summons a devastating tornado at the targets location, that traps enemies and deals {tornado_damage} damage to them.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.wind_twister: Launch a circling-moving whirlwind, that knock's back targets it hits and damages them by {twister_damage} damage.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.wind_updraft: Create a powerful updraft that lifts enemies into the air, leaving them vulnerable while suspended and dealing {damage} damage.
spell.elemental_wizards_rpg.wind_windfie: Calls a field of strong wind that deals {damage} damage and reduces movement speed by {bonus} for {effect_duration} sec.
